title: eurybia oporina
intro: Eurybia oporina, also known as the "Forked Eurybia", is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is native to the coastal regions of the northern Atlantic Ocean, particularly in North America and Europe. Eurybia oporina has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its terpene and flavonoid compounds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting digestion.
